info.title: SM Edge - Chicago Sports API
info.description: Public read-only API for Chicago sports content from Sports Mockery. Covers Bears (NFL), Bulls (NBA), Cubs (MLB), Blackhawks (NHL), and White Sox (MLB).

get.summary: Get Chicago sports content - articles, live scores, search, or team info

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Content type: articles (latest news), search (find by keyword), live (current game scores), teams (team directory)

parameters.name: team
parameters.description: Filter by Chicago team (only for type=articles)

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query (required for type=search, optional filter for type=articles)
